description: CompositionBlue long sleeve shirt with cerise pink stripes in 100% cotton, mid sleeve button to hold folded sleeves, brand logo embroidered on the left chest above a flap pocket, half length button plackets with shoulder flapsFitComfortWash careMachine wash in warm waterWash only with like coloursUse mild detergentDo not bleachDry under shadeUse warm ironWith summer here, there's no better way to keep your cool than by opting for a striped shirt like this one from spykar. Fold up the sleeves and pin them to the mid arm button to escape the heat and humidity while you stay all comfy in the cotton. Let it hang loose over your light blue denims and team it with funky canvas shoes for a great casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
